message:
feat(robot): consolidate mail actions into robot-mail-check, add ack_required field

Replace the separate robot-mail-read and robot-mail-ack attention actions
with a single robot-mail-check action that carries project_key, agent,
thread, and status filters.  This gives the attention feed a canonical
command the robot can execute without needing to pick between read/ack.

Also:
- Add projectKey parameter to PublishMailPending / PublishMailAckRequired
  so the attention event carries the project context.
- Surface ack_required in MailCheckMessage JSON output.
- Fix reservation-conflict events to use the richer
  attentionReservationConflictActions helper.
- Tests assert the new action format and ack_required round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ type MailCheckMessage struct {
 	BodyDisclosure    *adapters.DisclosureMetadata `json:"body_disclosure,omitempty"`
 	ThreadID          *string                      `json:"thread_id,omitempty"`
 	Importance        string                       `json:"importance"`
+	AckRequired       bool                         `json:"ack_required"`
 	Read              bool                         `json:"read"`
 	Timestamp         string                       `json:"timestamp"`
 }
@@ -367,6 +368,7 @@ func mailCheckMessageFromInbox(msg agentmail.InboxMessage, recipient string, inc
 		BodyDisclosure:    bodyDisclosure,
 		ThreadID:          msg.ThreadID,
 		Importance:        msg.Importance,
+		AckRequired:       msg.AckRequired,
 		Read:              msg.ReadAt != nil,
 		Timestamp:         msg.CreatedTS.Format(time.RFC3339),
 	}

@@ -7793,7 +7793,7 @@ func normalizedCoordinationProblemEvent(ts time.Time, session string, problem ad
 		if len(agents) > 0 {
 			details["holders"] = agents
 		}
-		actions = attentionConflictActions(session, robotFirstNonEmpty(attentionStringDetail(details, "path"), attentionStringDetail(details, "pattern")), "Inspect the conflicting reservation state")
+		actions = attentionReservationConflictActions(session, details, "Inspect the conflicting reservation state")
 	case "file_conflict":
 		reasonCode = adapters.ReasonCoordinationFileConflict
 		category = EventCategoryFile
